common.continueWithLanguage: Select the language you want to continue with.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Pick up where you left off.
login.illustrationText: Keep projects moving with quick, reliable sign in.

register.title: Create your free account
register.subtitle: Launch your workspace in minutes.
register.illustrationText: Get your team synced with a clean, confident workspace.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: We will send a reset link to your email.
forgotPassword.illustrationText: Enter your email and we will help you get back in.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password to secure your account.
resetPassword.illustrationText: Update your credentials and keep your work safe.

state.error: Unable to load settings. Please try again.
state.empty: No settings data is available yet.

requirements.title: Password requirements:
requirements.description: Ensure that these requirements are met:
requirements.minLength: At least 10 characters (and up to 100 characters)
requirements.specialCharacter: Inclusion of at least one special character, e.g., ! @ # ?

notifications.alertsDescription: You can set up Themesberg to get notifications
notifications.emailDescription: You can set up Themesberg to get email notifications

companyNews.title: Company News
companyNews.description: Get Themesberg news, announcements, and product updates

accountActivity.title: Account Activity
accountActivity.description: Get important notifications about you or activity you've missed

meetupsNearYou.title: Meetups Near You
meetupsNearYou.description: Get an email when a Dribbble Meetup is posted close to my location

newMessages.title: New Messages
newMessages.description: Get Themesberg news, announcements, and product updates

ratingReminders.title: Rating reminders
ratingReminders.description: Send an email reminding me to rate an item a week after purchase

itemUpdateNotifications.title: Item update notifications
itemUpdateNotifications.description: Send an email when an item I've purchased is updated

itemCommentNotifications.title: Item comment notifications
itemCommentNotifications.description: Send me an email when someone comments on one of my items

buyerReviewNotifications.title: Buyer review notifications
buyerReviewNotifications.description: Send me an email when someone leaves a review with their rating

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 10 characters
validation.passwordFormat: Password must include one lowercase letter and one special character
